text.message: Brick for nb black? I’m gonna knight
U said it too late black tbf
Sry meant to retype but not send
Gave him a city and then he blocked you lol
I don’t know why you traded him
You knew he’s begging for a city
Tough call between red and blue for me
I’m too far from roads or army there’s no chance really
I don’t get roads so how would I get road,?
And I’m there knights away from army and he can stack more knights
I’m at 2 and he’s at 4, gotta be delusional to think it’s close
